name: Operations, Release, And Deployment
status: current local / historical production release gate

results.name: Build
results.notes: Mobile scaffold build echo, API tsc, Web Next production build with 30 static pages.

results.name: Local DB backup/restore check without infra
results.notes: Failed because no Postgres container was running.

results.name: Local DB backup/restore check with infra
results.command: corepack pnpm run go-live:infra:up; corepack pnpm run ops:db:backup-restore:check-local; corepack pnpm run go-live:infra:down

findings.summary: Local typecheck, lint, and build release gates pass.
Local go-live smoke passes and cleans up local infrastructure.
Local backup/restore check passes when local Postgres container is running.
Production release gate was not rerun for a new deployment target.
Mobile build remains scaffold-only and is tracked under AUD-21.
